name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-96
title: rabbit-cage spec Inv 1/2/4/5/6/7 falsely claim symlinks; reality is copy-file deployment (or no path at all)
description:
Spec invariants describe surface paths as symlinks; filesystem reality is copy-file deployment via build-contract.json, and two of the claimed paths don't exist at all.

Verified via stat / readlink / find -type l / ls -lF: ZERO symlinks anywhere under .claude/. The build-contract.json deploys all surface paths as copy-file targets with sha256 drift checks in test-generated-surface.py — the implementation has been copy-file-based for some time.

Drift table:
- Inv 1: claims  is symlink → reality: real directory, copy-file
- Inv 2: claims  is symlink → reality: real directory, copy-file
- Inv 4: claims  is symlink → reality: real file, copy-file
- Inv 5: claims  is symlink → reality: does not exist (consumers use  directly)
- Inv 6: claims  is symlink → reality: does not exist (consumers use  directly)
- Inv 7: claims  (repo root) is symlink → reality: real file, copy-file

Detected during wave-7 follow-up cross-checking. ws39's wave-7 sweep missed this because its rubric was prose-pattern-focused (legacy/back-compat wording). The false claims here don't contain 'legacy' or 'previously' markers — they're plain false in present tense, exactly the kind of drift the rabbit-feature-audit's structural-check class SHOULD catch but doesn't.

Fix:
1. Rewrite Inv 1, 2, 4, 7 to describe copy-file deployment from rabbit-cage/-source via build-contract.json targets.
2. Rewrite Inv 5, 6 to describe the canonical access path: consumers reference  directly; no intermediation. Keeps monotonic numbering without gaps.
3. Add regression test test-rabbit-cage-surface-shape.py that asserts the actual filesystem TYPE of each surface path matches what the spec claims. Test breaks if anyone changes the spec to claim something the filesystem contradicts (or vice versa).

Acceptance: spec invariants describe reality; new regression test passes; all existing tests still pass; deployed copies unchanged.

history.note: Spec drift fixed: Inv 1/2/4/5/6/7/9 now describe copy-file deployment reality + new regression test test-rabbit-cage-bug-96-surface-shape.py locks the spec-vs-filesystem correspondence. PR #179 merged.
